results.title: Ariadna: AI talent agent for creative industry | Product Hunt
results.content:
Hi Product Hunt 👋 I’m Vit, founder of Ariadna.  
  
For years, building a career has felt like navigating a maze without a map. Whether you're a founder searching for collaborators, or a designer defining your next move, or someone aligning work with purpose, the journey often feels lonely and uncertain—not just in finding the right people, but in knowing which path to take next.  
  
I've lived it firsthand. When I moved to New York, I had no network, no roadmap—just a series of cold emails, countless meetings, and trial-and-error moments. The process was messy, but along the way, I learned two crucial truths: the right connection can change everything, and even more importantly, having a trusted guide can transform confusion into clarity. [...] @ryangilbert 🙏

Paul Mit
Flowmapp

Flowmapp

Hey friends 👋

I'm very excited to hunt an incredibly cool and interesting product that could change the way creative people collaborate and take our opportunities to the next level.

Incredible concept, great idea and a lovely design team.

Ariadna is really dope ❤️

Let's collaborate!

Vit Abramov
Ariadna

Ariadna

@mituhin Hey Paul, thanks for hunting us!

Paul Mit
Flowmapp

Flowmapp

Holga Balina
Ariadna

Ariadna

@mituhin 💜

Kay Kwak

Absolutely. Everyone faces difficulties in building connections. Moreover, finding the right partner for collaboration can be incredibly time-intensive and emotionally demanding. My friends will definitely need this as well, so I’ll share it with them! Congrats on the launch !🎉

Vit Abramov
Ariadna

Ariadna [...] Workspaces

Been looking forward to this launch!

What was the original hunch that led to you pursuing this idea?

Vit Abramov
Ariadna

Ariadna

@ryangilbert Hey mate! Appreciate you showing up! The timing feels perfect – the tech is finally here (no way we could've done this before llms). As for the hunch, I kept seeing how many talented people were struggling to figure out their path and find their tribe. Wanted to help people connect with the right opportunities and collaborators who truly get them. There's so much untapped potential out there!

Holga Balina
Ariadna

Ariadna

@ryangilbert 🙏

Paul Mit
